sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient presents with a chief complaint of left shoulder pain.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The pain is exacerbated by overhead reaching and is rated 7/10.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's history includes a previous rotator cuff tear and reports difficulty with overhead activities.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order an X-ray of the left shoulder and prescribe a short course of NSAIDs.
